hyperedges.label: All DS components form the Live Bracket Design System
MatchCard composes Avatar and is part of bracket UI
SearchField and SegmentedControl use Icon and form the Forms group

nodes.label: 3-Layer Architecture (Directive / Orchestration / Execution)
nodes.rationale: Separates probabilistic LLM decision-making from deterministic script execution to reduce compounding errors. 90% accuracy per step = 59% success over 5 steps — pushing complexity into deterministic code fixes that.
